message:
🌱 Add litellm: [Bug]: langfuse_otel (python v3 SDK) callback does not nest mission (#1343)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "litellm-11742-bug-langfuse-otel-python-v3-sdk-callback-does-not-nest-calls-prope",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "litellm: [Bug]: langfuse_otel (python v3 SDK) callback does not nest calls properly",
+    "description": "[Bug]: langfuse_otel (python v3 SDK) callback does not nest calls properly. This issue affects 15+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify litellm troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your litellm deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm -n litellm --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review litellm configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant litellm configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm\nkubectl get configmap -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=litellm\n```\n### What happened?\n\nConsider:\n\n```\nfrom langfuse import observe\n\nimport litellm\nfrom litellm import completion\nlitellm.success_callback = [\"langfuse_otel\"]\nlitellm.failure_callback = [\"langfuse_otel\"]\n\n(name=\"testing\")\ndef f(a: int = 3) -> bool:\n   "
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [Bug]: langfuse_otel (python v3 SDK) callback does not nest…",
+        "description": "This PR implements a new Langfuse OpenTelemetry integration that allows LiteLLM to send observability data to Langfuse using the standardi\n```yaml\nfrom langfuse import observe\n\nimport litellm\nfrom litellm import completion\nlitellm.success_callback = [\"langfuse_otel\"]\nlitellm.failure_callback = [\"langfuse_otel\"]\n\n@observe(name=\"testing\")\ndef f(a: int = 3) -> bool:\n    completion(model=\"anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-20250514\", messages=[{\"role\": \"user\", \"content\": \"Hello, how are you?\"}])\n    return a > 2\n\n\nf()\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm [Bug]: langfuse_otel (python v3 SDK) callback… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm -n litellm --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n litellm --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This PR implements a new Langfuse OpenTelemetry integration that allows LiteLLM to send observability data to Langfuse using the standardi",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "from langfuse import observe\n\nimport litellm\nfrom litellm import completion\nlitellm.success_callback = [\"langfuse_otel\"]\nlitellm.failure_callback = [\"langfuse_otel\"]\n\n@observe(name=\"testing\")\ndef f(a: int = 3) -> bool:\n    completion(model=\"anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-20250514\", messages=[{\"role\": \"user\", \"content\": \"Hello, how are you?\"}])\n    return a > 2\n\n\nf()",
+        "Overriding of current TracerProvider is not allowed\n10:48:53 - LiteLLM:WARNING: opentelemetry.py:141 - Proxy Server is not installed. Skipping OpenTelemetry initialization.",
+        "@observe(name=\"testing\")\ndef f(a: int = 3) -> bool:\n    with langfuse_client.start_as_current_span(\n        name=\"testing nested span\",\n    ) as span:\n        completion(model=\"anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-20250514\", messages=[{\"role\": \"user\", \"content\": \"Hello, how are you?\"}], metadata={\n            \"langfuse_parent_observation_id\": span.id,\n            \"langfuse_trace_id\": span.trace_id,\n            \"trace_id\": span.trace_id,\n            \"parent_span_id\": span.id,\n            \"existing_trace_id\": span.trace_id,\n            \"parent_observation_id\": span.id,\n            \"generation_id\": span.id\n        })\n    return a > 2\n\n\nf()"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "litellm",
+      "community",
+      "llm-gateway",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],

+      "litellm"
+    ],

+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],

+      "issue": "https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/issues/11742",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/11607"
+    },
+    "reactions": 15,

+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },

+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],

+  },
